bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access.name: Authorization
Location-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Location-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account.

Agency-Access.name: Authorization
Agency-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency (OR) Private Integration Token of Agency.

Agency-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Agency-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency.

label.description: Question label text shown to the user

type.description: Question input type — use a prefilled type for standard fields or CUSTOM / SHORT_ANSWER for freeform questions

options.description: Answer options for multiple-choice questions (only applies to CUSTOM type)

checkboxes.description: Consent checkboxes the user must agree to before submitting the form

example.text: I agree to the Terms & Conditions
I would like to receive marketing emails

questions.description: List of questions displayed on the lead form
Quick-reply questions shown in the welcome message of the conversation form

example.question: How can we help?
example.response: Thanks for reaching out! A team member will assist you shortly.

example.question: I want to learn more
example.response: Great! Here is a link to our services.

selectionType.description: Whether the location is included or excluded from targeting

radius.description: Targeting radius around the location (for city/address types)

type.description: Interest category type (defaults to "interests" if omitted)

geo_locations.description: Geographic locations to target or exclude

placements.description: Ad placement positions per platform (only used when placementType is "manual")

placementType.description: Placement strategy — "auto" lets Facebook choose, "manual" uses the placements config

audience.description: Targeting audience configuration including geo-locations, locales, placements, and custom audiences

thumbnailUrl.description: Thumbnail URL (required when type is video)

selectedPoster.description: Selected poster index (required when type is video)

media.description: Media items (images or videos) attached to the ad creative

startMinute.description: Minute mark the schedule starts at

endMinute.description: Minute mark the schedule ends at

dayOfWeek.description: Day of the week for this schedule

adScheduleTargets.description: Ad schedule targets restricting when the call asset is shown

resourceName.description: Google Ads resource name for an existing call asset
Google Ads resource name for an existing sitelink asset

adScheduleTargets.description: Ad schedule targets restricting when the sitelink is shown

inputType.description: Field input type from Google Ads LeadFormFieldUserInputType

singleChoiceAnswers.description: Single-choice answer options for the field

customQuestionText.description: Custom question text shown to the user
customQuestionText.example: What service are you interested in?

singleChoiceAnswers.description: Answer choices for the custom question

resourceName.description: Google Ads resource name for an existing lead form asset

description.example: Fill out this form and we will contact you within 24 hours

businessName.description: Business name shown on the form

fields.description: Form fields to collect user input

callToActionDescription.description: Description text for the CTA button

customQuestionFields.description: Custom question fields appended after standard fields

postSubmitDescription.example: We will be in touch shortly

finalUrls.description: Final URL shown after form submission

defaultValue.description: Default monetary value assigned to each conversion

defaultCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the default value

alwaysUseDefaultValue.description: When true, always uses the default value even if a transaction-specific value is provided

valueSettings.description: Value settings that control how monetary value is attributed to conversions

countingType.description: How conversions are counted per interaction

attributionModel.description: Attribution model used to credit conversions

type.description: Asset type to create or update

payload.description: Asset payload — shape depends on the type field: CallAssetPayload (CALL), SitelinkAssetPayload (SITELINK), or LeadFormAssetPayload (LEAD_FORM)

members.description: Segment members — keywords, URLs, or apps that define the custom segment

customAudiences.description: Resource names of custom audience segments

userLists.description: Resource names of user lists (remarketing lists, customer match lists, etc.)

userInterests.description: Resource names of user interest segments (in-market or affinity audiences)

audienceSegments.description: Audience segment references used for targeting

long_name.description: Full name of the address component

short_name.description: Abbreviated name of the address component

type.description: Location type (city, region, country, address, etc.)

geometry.description: Geometry data from Google Geocoding API

address_components.description: Address components from Google Geocoding API

negative.description: Whether this is a negative target

error.description: Error message if asset upload failed

googleAdGroupId.description: Google Ads ad group resource ID

value.description: Goal value (e.g. conversion action resource name)

isCustomConversionGoal.description: Whether this is a custom conversion goal

unpublishedChanges.description: Whether the campaign has unpublished changes

include.description: Included targeting attributes (groups of ANDed attributes, ORed together)

amount.description: Bid amount in currency minor units

textQuestionDetails.description: Text question details (empty object for text questions)
